cases.prompt: I want to create python-skills
new skill repo icon-designer
scaffold a skills folder for terraform helpers
set up a new skills repository for data-viz stuff
create a collection of skills for sql review
start a repo for a single skill that designs app icons
make me a github-ready skills repo called docs-skills
i wanna create rust-skills pls
add a skill for icon design to the existing icon-designer repo
improve the bundled scaffold template in skillskit
fix the trigger evals of the python packaging skill
install the python-skills plugin in this project
create a new git repo for my flask app
what skills repos exist in this workspace?
turn this research pack into a skill
update the scaffold validator to check assets/
push icon-designer to github
I want to create python-skills - skills that help maintain high quality open source python packages
expected_behavior: runs scaffold.py with name python-skills, a benefit-led description, the user's idea, and --gitignore Python
the repo is created private on GitHub via gh repo create and the scaffold commit is pushed
resulting repo passes its validator with 0 errors
.local/PROMPT.md contains the user's idea and starts with /goal
hands off with cd python-skills && claude, paste-PROMPT instructions, and the publish (visibility flip + ruleset) steps

cases.prompt: create icon-designer, a single skill repo
expected_behavior: derives a kebab-case name without asking redundant questions
refuses to proceed if the folder exists locally or the repo already exists on GitHub
mentions .local/ is gitignored and where to drop sources

cases.prompt: scaffold Claude-Helpers as a new skills repo
expected_behavior: rejects or renames the name: uppercase and the reserved word claude are invalid
explains the naming constraint instead of silently proceeding
